page: Amazon Web Services m8gd.metal-24xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server powered by 96 dedicated physical cores of the AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processor architecture running at 2.8 GHz. It features 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The server includes 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance type.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU physics tests scoring in the top 10% of all tested configurations. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, with cached read speeds reaching 11105.14 GB/sec and uncached large-block read speeds at 481.33 GB/sec. Database operations are highly efficient, as demonstrated by top-tier performance in Redis SET operations and Passmark database tests. Single-core performance is strong, though single-threaded gzip compression and CPU encryption tests fall into the average tier.

The bare-metal architecture offers high resource density and eliminates hypervisor overhead, making it highly cost-efficient for workloads that scale linearly with physical core counts. However, the lack of hardware-accelerated graphics or AVX instruction sets limits its utility for legacy x86-specific software or heavy GPU-bound tasks. This server is optimized for high-throughput database hosting, large-scale software compilation, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.

og_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.metal-24xl is a bare-metal server with 96 Graviton ARMv9 cores, 384 GB DDR5 RAM, and 5700 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8gd.metal-24xl features 96 Graviton ARMv9 cores, 384 GB DDR5 RAM, and 5700 GB NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A bare-metal ARMv9 server featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, high-speed DDR5 memory, and massive local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 96 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 cores at 2.8 GHz
Equipped with 384 GB of high-speed DDR5 system memory
Includes 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for high-throughput database operations and software compilation
